description: Husband beat wife repeatedly over dowry demands. She was hospitalised twice.
resolution: Filed FIR. Court granted protection order. Majlis Law provided legal aid. Husband arrested.

description: Husband strangled wife and attempted to kill her. She escaped to a neighbour's house.
resolution: Emergency shelter at One Stop Centre. FIR under IPC 307. Husband remanded to custody.

description: Husband poured kerosene on wife and set her on fire after a dowry dispute. 40% burns.
resolution: Husband arrested. Treated at government burns unit. Convicted — 10 years imprisonment.

description: Husband verbally abuses wife every day in front of children. No physical violence.
resolution: Protection Officer issued formal warning. Counselling ordered.

description: Live-in partner physically assaulted and abandoned woman with a toddler, no financial support.
resolution: Court granted residence order and Rs 8000/month maintenance.

description: Husband gambled away all savings, sold wife jewellery without consent, denies her money for food.
resolution: Court ordered Rs 5000/month maintenance.

description: Mother-in-law and husband harassed woman for not producing a male child. Starved her.
resolution: NCW intervened. Protection order granted.

description: Woman locked inside house for 6 months, denied phone and contact with family.
resolution: Neighbour alerted NCW. Police freed woman. FIR filed.

description: Husband forced wife to work as domestic help and took all her earnings.
resolution: Court ordered husband to return wages and pay maintenance.

description: Woman beaten every time husband drank alcohol. Ribs broken on two occasions.
resolution: Majlis Law filed FIR. Husband convicted under IPC 325.

description: Husband burned her hands on stove when dinner was not ready on time.
resolution: Neighbour called police. Husband arrested. Fast-track court case filed.

description: Husband sent her abusive voice notes threatening to throw her out with no money.
resolution: Voice notes used as evidence. Protection officer issued notice.

description: Woman not given food for 3 days as punishment for talking to her parents on phone.
resolution: One Stop Centre gave immediate shelter. FIR filed. Husband arrested.

description: Husband forced wife to sign blank documents and transferred her savings to his account.
resolution: Bank alerted. Transactions reversed by court order.

description: Husband threatened to take away children if wife reported domestic violence.
resolution: Court granted interim custody to wife. Protection order issued.

description: Gang rape by two men known to the victim. Family pressured her not to report.
resolution: One Stop Centre provided shelter. Fast-track court convicted both men.

description: Father-in-law sexually assaulted her repeatedly when husband was away for work.
resolution: iCall helpline guided her to police. FIR registered. Accused arrested.

description: Woman raped by auto driver on the way home at night.
resolution: Police caught driver using CCTV. Fast-track court convicted him.

description: Minor girl aged 14 raped by school teacher during extra class.
resolution: Teacher arrested. POCSO court convicted him — 10 years jail.

description: Colleague drugged her drink at office party and assaulted her.
resolution: Medical examination confirmed assault. Accused arrested. DNA evidence used.

description: University professor coerced student into sexual relationship for better grades.
resolution: University ICC complaint. Police FIR filed. Professor dismissed.

description: Stepfather sexually abused daughter from age 10 to 15.
resolution: Teacher reported to CWC. Stepfather arrested. Convicted — 20 years.

description: Woman assaulted by security guard at her apartment complex at night.
resolution: CCTV evidence. Guard arrested same night. Fast-track case filed.

description: Male colleague sent explicit messages and touched her inappropriately at workplace.
resolution: Filed complaint with ICC. ICC found accused guilty. Terminated.

description: Boss threatened to fire her if she did not comply with his sexual advances.
resolution: ECC found employer guilty. Compensation offered.

description: Senior male teacher made obscene comments to a 17-year-old student repeatedly.
resolution: FIR under POCSO. Teacher arrested and suspended.

description: Doctor at government hospital demanded sexual favours to approve medical leave.
resolution: SHe-Box complaint filed. Doctor suspended.

description: Employer took explicit photos of woman employee during office trip without her knowledge.
resolution: ICC investigation plus police FIR. Employer convicted.

description: Domestic worker sexually harassed by male employer daily.
legal_sections: IPC 354A, IPC 506, Payment of Wages Act
resolution: NCW complaint. Police registered FIR. Wages recovered.

description: Woman nursing student harassed by senior doctor during hospital rounds.
resolution: External Complaints Committee filed. Doctor suspended for 2 years.

description: Female journalist groped by politician during press conference caught on camera.
resolution: Video evidence. Politician arrested. She refused out-of-court settlement.

description: Stranger stalked woman for 3 months, followed her home, sent threatening messages.
resolution: FIR under IPC 354D. Restraining order granted.

description: Ex-boyfriend followed her to work every day after breakup, stood outside her house at night.
resolution: Police warned him. He continued. FIR filed. Arrested. 3-year sentence.

description: Unknown man took photos of her at gym without consent, posted on social media.
resolution: Cyber cell and police complaint. Man identified. Arrested.

description: Man sent 200 messages a day to a woman after she rejected his proposal.
resolution: Police complaint. Man arrested. Order to maintain distance issued.

description: Neighbour repeatedly followed her on morning walks and appeared wherever she went.
resolution: Police FIR. Restraining order issued.

description: Morphed obscene photos of her face circulated on WhatsApp groups.
resolution: cybercrime.gov.in complaint. Content removed. Accused traced and arrested.

description: Ex-husband sent nude photos to her parents as revenge after separation.
resolution: Police filed case under IT Act. Platforms notified. Husband arrested.

description: Man created fake Instagram profile with her photos, chatted pretending to be her.
resolution: Cyber cell complaint. Fake profile taken down. Perpetrator arrested.

description: Video of woman being assaulted was shared on pornographic websites without consent.
resolution: IT Cell contacted platforms for takedown. FIR filed. Accused arrested.

description: Boss sent obscene voice messages to female employee on work communication app.
resolution: Screenshots preserved. ICC and police approached. Boss suspended.

description: Deepfake video created using her face in explicit content and shared in college group.
resolution: College FIR. Cyber cell identified creator. Expelled and arrested.

description: Man threatened to release her private photos if she did not pay Rs 50000.
resolution: Police cyber cell complaint. Man arrested. He was convicted.

description: Someone accessed her iCloud and shared her private photos in a Telegram group.
resolution: Cyber cell traced Telegram group admin. Arrested. Content removed.

description: Unknown person sent threatening emails saying he knows her location.
resolution: Cyber cell traced sender. FIR filed. Restraining order granted.

description: Man sent hundreds of threatening messages on Instagram after she blocked him.
resolution: Cyber cell FIR. Platform takedown. Man arrested.

description: Someone created anonymous account to post her location and daily schedule publicly.
resolution: Cyber crime complaint. Anonymous account traced. Perpetrator arrested.

description: Man posted her home address and phone number on a forum inviting harassment.
resolution: Cyber cell FIR. Forum reported for content removal. Perpetrator arrested.

description: In-laws demanded more dowry, confiscated jewellery, locked her inside house.
resolution: NCW intervened. Jewellery recovered. In-laws booked under IPC 498A.

description: Husband family demanded Rs 5 lakh cash 6 months after marriage, threatened to abandon her.
resolution: Police FIR. Husband and in-laws arrested.

description: Woman burnt to death by in-laws within 2 years of marriage due to dowry dispute.
resolution: All in-laws arrested under IPC 304B. Life imprisonment for husband.

description: Bride parents forced to give car as dowry at last minute before wedding.
resolution: FIR against groom family. Dowry Prohibition Officer investigated.

description: Husband demanded dowry via WhatsApp messages. Screenshots used as evidence.
resolution: Screenshots submitted as evidence. FIR filed.

description: Ex-boyfriend threw acid on her face after she refused to resume relationship.
resolution: FIR registered at hospital. Rs 3 lakh compensation. Chhanv Foundation rehabilitation.

description: Neighbour threw acid on a 16-year-old girl after she rejected his advances.
resolution: Arrested same day. Fast-track court. Convicted — life imprisonment.

description: Woman acid attacked by jilted suitor outside her college gate.
resolution: Witnesses helped catch attacker. 12-year sentence. Victim got compensation.

description: Acid thrown on woman hands by husband relatives to mark her.
resolution: All accused arrested. Victim received Rs 5 lakh from Victim Compensation Fund.

description: Minor girl aged 16 trafficked from village under false promise of factory job.
resolution: Rescued by Prajwala. Trafficker convicted — 7 years. Girl enrolled in rehabilitation.

description: Woman lured to city with fake modelling job, forced into prostitution.
resolution: Rescued in police raid. Trafficker arrested. Victim received Ujjawala scheme support.

description: Bride sold by husband to another man within a month of marriage.
resolution: Both men arrested. Conviction — 10 years each.

description: Woman forced into marriage at 15 by parents after receiving money from groom family.
legal_sections: Prohibition of Child Marriage Act 2006, IPC 370
resolution: Childline 1098 alerted. CWC intervened. Marriage declared void.

description: Children trafficked from tribal village under guise of school enrollment.
resolution: NGO rescued 12 children. Traffickers convicted. Children rehabilitated.

description: Male relatives threatened to kill her for talking to a boy from another caste.
resolution: High Court protection order. Relatives arrested. Woman relocated safely.

description: Woman killed by brother for marrying man of her choice. Honour killing.
resolution: Brother sentenced to death. Rarest of rare ruling by Supreme Court.

description: Khap panchayat ordered woman and her husband to separate. Threatened violence.
resolution: High Court stayed panchayat order. Police protection provided.

description: Girl family locked her up for 3 months after discovering her boyfriend from another religion.
resolution: Habeas corpus petition in High Court. Girl released.

description: Woman threatened by in-laws for filing for divorce. Asked to drop case.
resolution: Police protection granted. FIR against in-laws. Divorce proceedings continued.

description: Unknown men groped her in a crowded public bus. She screamed but bystanders ignored.
resolution: CCTV footage used. Accused identified. Arrested.

description: Man rubbed against her in metro train deliberately despite there being space.
resolution: Metro security alerted. Man held. Police FIR filed.

description: Doctor examined her inappropriately during a routine check-up.
resolution: Police FIR plus complaint to Medical Council. Doctor suspended.

description: Religious leader at temple touched her inappropriately under guise of blessing.
resolution: Community members supported her complaint. Police FIR filed.

description: Plumber at her house touched her without consent while pretending to show a pipe issue.
resolution: Police complaint. Man identified through agency records. FIR filed.

description: Brothers refused to give her share of father property despite legal right.
resolution: DLSA legal aid. Civil suit filed. Settled out of court.

description: In-laws sold marital home without informing wife after husband death.
resolution: Court issued stay on sale. Wife rights established.

description: Father gifted all property to sons, excluded daughters entirely from will.
resolution: Legal challenge filed. Court ruled in daughter favour. Equal share awarded.

description: Husband transferred all shared property to his mother before filing for divorce.
legal_sections: IPC 406, IPC 420, Transfer of Property Act
resolution: Court reversed transfer as fraudulent. Property restored.

description: Employer withheld salary for 4 months and threatened to cancel work permit.
resolution: Labour commissioner complaint. Employer ordered to release dues.

description: Garment factory women forced to work 14-hour shifts with no overtime pay.
resolution: Labour inspector raid. Factory fined. Workers given overtime dues.

description: Domestic worker not paid for 6 months and threatened with police if she complained.
legal_sections: Payment of Wages Act, IPC 374, IPC 506
resolution: NGO SEWA helped file labour court case. All dues recovered.

description: Migrant woman worker passport confiscated by employer. Forced to work without pay.
legal_sections: Bonded Labour Abolition Act, IPC 374, IPC 342
resolution: eMigrate helpline contacted. Passport recovered. Employer arrested.

description: Women agricultural workers paid Rs 50 per day less than male workers for same work.
legal_sections: Equal Remuneration Act 1976, Minimum Wages Act
resolution: Labour department complaint. Employer directed to equalise pay.
